mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiries ( name, email, subject, message, admin_reply, replied_at, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{subject}, #{message}, #{adminReply}, #{repliedAt}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, subject, message, admin_reply, replied_at, status, created_at, updated_at FROM inquiries ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, subject, message, admin_reply, replied_at, status, created_at, updated_at FROM inquiries WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiries SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inquiries SET admin_reply = #{reply}, replied_at = #{repliedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
